notes: The full street economy update: corner selling with customers that walk up to you, plane and boat selling runs, a roaming narcos bulk buyer, pushers with work hours, black-market auctions with live bidding, territory wars (faction points, hot zones, owner bonuses and gang alerts), player-hired dealers with heat, arrests and robberies managed from a new trap phone, buyable factories with worker upgrades, wild drug fields, advanced lab crafting with fire/explosion hazards, trigger-item pocket crafting, drug sharing while puffing, new hallucination effects, police systems (minimum cops, alert blips, low-cop price reduction), Discord logs and a statistics dashboard.
